title: cousinia alpina f. alpina
intro: Cousinia alpina f. alpina, also known as Alpine Cousinia, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cousinia alpina f. alpina include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its essential oil can be extracted for further use in aromatherapy and topical applications.
